changelog:
Polie - PyPKG Manager v0.4.2 - Stable Release

[CORE & ARCHITECTURE]
- Unified the upgrade mechanism by linking the 'upgrade' command directly to 'default_upgrade()' with '--noconfirm' support.
- Fixed all argument mismatch crashes inside the loop of the upgrade script.

[EASY-MENU v0.2]
- Fixed critical bugs, crashes, and unhandled KeyboardInterrupt exceptions.
- Cleaned up interface flow by implementing an automated screen-clear helper function.
- Added full support for Uninstalling, Installing, and Upgrading packages straight from the visual menu.

[PACKAGES MANAGEMENT]
- Re-engineered package search: replaced partial matches with a secure content-in-name verification algorithm.
- Implemented 'uninstall_pkg' tool with full automated '--noconfirm' support.
- Fully automated download pathways to store packages into structural subfolders dynamically.

[STABILITY & UI]
- Replaced legacy functions with robust, centralized exception handling.
- Polished user interface feedback messages for downloads, extractions, and failures.
